title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: Updated ubi9-minimal container image
overview: An update for Updated is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The Universal Base Image Minimal (ubi9-minimal) is a stripped-down image that uses microdnf as the package manager.To pull a container image, run the following command as root:podman pull registry.access.redhat.com/<image_name>
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64

fixes.description: CVE-2025-3576 krb5: Kerberos RC4-HMAC-MD5 Checksum Vulnerability Enabling Message Spoofing via MD5 Collisions

full_text:
An update for Updated is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The Universal Base Image Minimal (ubi9-minimal) is a stripped-down image that uses microdnf as the package manager.To pull a container image, run the following command as root:podman pull registry.access.redhat.com/<image_name>
